mainEntity.name: Who is the best attorney for Workplace injury in St. George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Jared Mortensen at Just Work Comp Law is a highly experienced attorney specializing in Workplace injury serving St. George. Jared has practiced law since 2008, and his sole focus now is workers comp law—helping those who’ve been denied benefits get the help they deserve. Contact us at 801-746-0290.
